# IntrICT
> IntrICT is a Ghent-based web development studio founded by Jonas Van Twembeke,
> specializing in modern websites, Next.js web applications, UI/UX design,
> SEO/GEO optimization, and digital strategy for businesses in Belgium and the Netherlands.

## About IntrICT

**Founder:** Jonas Van Twembeke — Web Developer & Digital Strategist, Gent, Belgium.
Specialized in Next.js, React, TypeScript, UI/UX Design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/VanTwembeke
GitHub: https://github.com/VanTwembeke
Contact: help@intrict.com | Available Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 CET

IntrICT builds fast, accessible, and visually refined websites using modern technologies
such as Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Founded in Ghent (Oost-Vlaanderen),
Belgium, serving clients across Belgium and the Netherlands.

Core values: quality, performance, transparency, and long-term collaboration.

## Services

- **Website Development:** Responsive websites and web applications built with Next.js, React,
  and TypeScript. From simple landing page to complex web application.
- **Logo & Branding:** Unique visual identity including logo, color palette, and typography
  tailored to the target audience.
- **Digital Strategy:** SEO, GEO, analytics, content strategy, and user experience optimization.
- **Technical Support:** Hosting, security, updates, and performance monitoring.
- **E-commerce Development:** Custom online stores and payment integrations.
- **Crypto & Blockchain Consulting:** Practical advice on cryptocurrency and blockchain technology.
- **GDPR Compliance Support:** Privacy audits and compliance assistance for Belgian law.
- **API Development:** Custom integrations and workflow automation.

## Blog Articles (Dutch)

- [Moderne, responsive websites](https://www.intrict.com/blog/website-ontwikkeling): Uitleg over moderne webontwikkeling met Next.js en waarom performance en responsiviteit cruciaal zijn voor Belgische bedrijven.
- [Logo & Branding: bouw een sterke visuele identiteit](https://www.intrict.com/blog/logo-en-branding): Gids over het bouwen van een herkenbare merkidentiteit inclusief logo, kleurenpalet en typografie.
- [Digitale Strategie: optimaliseer je online aanwezigheid](https://www.intrict.com/blog/digitale-strategie): Praktische gids over SEO, analytics en contentstrategie voor Belgische KMO's.
- [Technische Ondersteuning: stabiele digitale infrastructuur](https://www.intrict.com/blog/technische-ondersteuning): Overzicht van hosting, beveiliging, updates en performancemonitoring voor websites.
- [AI in 2026: kunstmatige intelligentie transformeert bedrijven](https://www.intrict.com/blog/AI-in-2026): Analyse van hoe AI tools en automatisering de manier van werken voor Belgische bedrijven veranderen in 2026.
- [Waarom WordPress verouderd is](https://www.intrict.com/blog/waarom-wordpress-verouderd-is): Vergelijking van WordPress met moderne frameworks zoals Next.js op vlak van performance, veiligheid en schaalbaarheid.
- [Lokale designer vs groot bureau](https://www.intrict.com/blog/lokale-designer-vs-groot-bureau): Waarom een kleine, gespecialiseerde web developer + AI-tools vaak meer waarde biedt dan een groot bureau, met lagere kosten.
- [GEO uitgelegd: hoe je in ChatGPT en AI Overviews komt (2026)](https://www.intrict.com/blog/geo-seo-ai-overviews-optimaliseren): Uitgebreide gids met 7 concrete tactieken voor Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — inclusief de English Bias voor Nederlandstalige sites en hoe je zichtbaarheid in ChatGPT, Perplexity en Google AI Overviews opbouwt.
- [Wat kost een website in België? Eerlijke prijzen 2026](https://www.intrict.com/blog/wat-kost-een-website-belgie): Volledige prijsbreakdown voor Belgische KMO's: uurtarieven (€60–€200/u), websitetypes van €800 tot €25.000+, jaarlijkse onderhoudskosten, en actuele status KMO-portefeuille subsidies (afgeschaft per 1 februari 2026).

- [Modern, responsive websites: building for every device](https://www.intrict.com/blog/website-development): Guide to modern web development with Next.js and why performance and responsiveness are critical for Belgian businesses.
- [Logo & Branding: build a strong visual identity](https://www.intrict.com/blog/logo-and-branding): How to build a recognizable brand identity including logo, color palette, and typography.

- [Technical Support: build and maintain a stable digital infrastructure](https://www.intrict.com/blog/technical-support): Overview of hosting, security, updates, and performance monitoring for websites.
- [AI in 2026: how artificial intelligence transforms businesses](https://www.intrict.com/blog/ai-in-2026): Analysis of how AI tools and automation are changing the way Belgian businesses work in 2026.
- [Why WordPress is outdated: the reality of modern web development](https://www.intrict.com/blog/why-wordpress-is-outdated): Comparison of WordPress vs modern frameworks like Next.js on performance, security, and scalability.
- [Local designer vs large agency: why small-scale + AI wins](https://www.intrict.com/blog/local-designer-vs-large-agency): Why a specialized solo web developer + AI tools often delivers more value than a large agency at lower cost.
- [GEO explained: how to get cited by ChatGPT and AI Overviews (2026)](https://www.intrict.com/blog/geo-explained-chatgpt-ai-overviews): Complete guide with 7 actionable GEO tactics including the English Bias issue for Dutch-language sites and how to build visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
- [How much does a website cost in Belgium? Honest prices 2026](https://www.intrict.com/blog/how-much-does-a-website-cost-in-belgium): Full price breakdown for Belgian SMEs: hourly rates (€60–€200/h), website types from €800 to €25,000+, annual maintenance costs, and current KMO-portefeuille subsidy status (discontinued February 2026).

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does a professional website cost in Belgium?**
A professional website for a Belgian SME costs between €2,000 and €8,000 on average. A simple landing page starts around €800; a full custom webshop can exceed €10,000. Hourly rates range from €60–€100/h for freelancers to €85–€150/h for agencies.

**What is GEO and how is it different from SEO?**
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) optimizes content to be cited by AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Unlike SEO which targets ranking positions, GEO targets inclusion in AI-generated answers. Both are complementary — strong SEO signals help GEO performance.

**Why choose Next.js over WordPress?**
Next.js delivers significantly better performance (Core Web Vitals), built-in TypeScript support, server-side rendering for SEO, and no plugin dependency hell. For growing businesses, Next.js scales better and is more secure than WordPress.

**Does IntrICT work with businesses outside Gent?**
Yes. IntrICT serves clients across Belgium and the Netherlands. Remote collaboration is standard; on-site meetings in Gent and the wider Oost-Vlaanderen region are possible.

## Technology Stack

Next.js · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion · Supabase · Vercel

## Crawling Policy

All public pages on intrict.com are freely crawlable and citable by AI systems.
See https://www.intrict.com/robots.txt for the full crawling policy.
All content may be cited for informational purposes with proper attribution to IntrICT (intrict.com).
